zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏强
zh.content:
以太坊当前维持在2120附近窄幅震荡，价格运行于20日均线上方，整体结构偏多但动能有限，多空博弈明显，市场进入短期整理阶段

MACD指标为12.23显示多头动能仍在延续，但信号线缺失限制判断，RSI暂不可用，短线动能偏中性略多，趋势确认度一般

下方支撑位关注2119及2108一线SMA20，上方阻力集中于2132前高，若放量突破则有望延续上行，否则仍以区间震荡为主

交易策略建议短线观望或低吸为主，回踩2108附近可分批布局多单，若跌破2119需警惕回调加深，止损可设于2100下方

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2121.02, holding slightly above its 20-day moving average at 2108.56, which suggests the broader short-term structure remains cautiously bullish despite muted momentum. The narrow intraday range between 2119.61 and 2132.27 reflects consolidation rather than aggressive directional movement. Price action indicates buyers are still defending the 2100 psychological area, although the weak 24-hour decline of 0.11% shows that bullish conviction remains limited in the current session.

The MACD reading at 12.23 continues to favor upward momentum, even without a confirmed signal line reading. This positive MACD value implies bullish pressure has not fully faded, particularly after Ethereum’s recent recovery attempts. RSI data is unavailable, but the market’s compressed trading behavior suggests neutral momentum conditions rather than overbought or oversold extremes. As long as ETH remains above the SMA(20), short-term sentiment is likely to stay moderately constructive rather than bearish.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is developing around 2115-2100, with stronger structural support near 2085 if volatility increases. Resistance is emerging around 2135, followed by a more significant barrier near 2160 where sellers could re-enter aggressively. A sustained breakout above 2135 may encourage momentum-driven buying and open the path toward higher retracement levels. Conversely, failure to hold above 2100 could trigger a short-term pullback and weaken bullish positioning.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish bias while Ethereum trades above the moving average zone. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above resistance before entering long positions, while short-term traders may look for range opportunities between support and resistance boundaries. Risk management remains essential because current volatility is relatively compressed, increasing the probability of a sharper directional move once consolidation resolves.
